creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
First observed at <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=xorg.conf&sektion=5&manpath=FreeBSD-Ports#DRI_SECTION> and <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=xorg.conf&sektion=5&manpath=FreeBSD-Ports#AUTHORS>. 

Then at <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=Xorg&sektion=1&manpath=FreeBSD-Ports#SEE_ALSO>, <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=Xorg&sektion=1&manpath=FreeBSD-Ports#AUTHORS>, ...


Reference
=========

RFC 3986 on use of angle brackets: <https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc3986#appendix-C>
